name: Fajitas Grande
recipeIngredient: 1 Large yellow onion, cut into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken breasts in a non-metallic container.
2. Top with onion rings and green pepper strips.
3. Combine marinade ingredients in a small bowl; mix well and pour over meat and onions.
4. Refrigerate 8 hours or overnight.
5. Remove the meat & onions from marinade, reserving the onions, peppers, and marinade.
6. Place meat on grill, basting often with the marinade and turning often.
7. Meanwhile, sauté onion and peppers in butter, adding salsa to keep them moist.
8. When the chicken breasts are done, slice into thin strips and add to the skillet with sauteed vegetables.
9. Heat flour tortillas quickly on the grill, watching and turning often.
10. Serve skillet mixture hot on warm flour tortillas with your choice of sour cream, grated cheddar and jack cheese, fresh cilantro, lettuce, chopped tomatoes, salsa, and guacamole.
